lastCompletedPackage.name: <short human name>
lastCompletedPackage.summary: <one to two sentences about what shipped>

latestProof.name: <short human name>
latestProof.summary: <one to two sentences about the deepest end-to-end proof>

nextQueue.goal: <one-line goal, only fires if the previous package surfaces a real gap>

stopConditions: <a class of action that requires explicit operator approval, e.g. 'adding durable storage'>
<another class, e.g. 'promoting any convention or pattern as canonical'>

commands: <command that proves the project still runs>
verificationBaseline.expectedTests: <test file count, test count, or other baseline>

governanceRule: Future work must update this file after each package. Future agents must load the doctrine MVD. The operator should not need chat history to know current focus, next queue, or stop conditions.
